segments.text: I know right, it really changes how easy it is
segments.original_text: 分かる分かる、やりやすさが違ってきますからね
上強始めのコンボが入って

segments.text: From that landing spot, they're setting up
segments.original_text: 着位置でおうかがいを立てて

full_text: I know right, it really changes how easy it is Up tilt combo connects! From that landing spot, they're setting up Let's go! Up B landing trap connects!

corrections.original: 上ツマシルめのコンボ
corrections.rule: Smash term: 上強 (up tilt) + 始め (starting with)
